ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the device */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower */,
  "network_mode" TEXT /* Network mode (e.g., LTE, 5G) */,
  "rsrp" INTEGER /* Reference signal received power (RSRP) */,
  "rsrq" INTEGER /* Reference signal received quality (RSRQ) */,
  "snr" INTEGER /* Signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) */,
  "cqi" INTEGER /* Channel quality indicator (CQI) */,
  "rssi" INTEGER /* Received signal strength indicator (RSSI) */,
  "dl_bitrate" INTEGER /* Downlink bitrate */,
  "ul_bitrate" INTEGER /* Uplink bitrate */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the device (e.g., D, I) */,
  "nrx_rsrp" TEXT /* NR RSRP */,
  "nrx_rsrq" TEXT /* NR RSRQ */,
  "serving_cell_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the serving cell */,
  "serving_cell_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the serving cell */,
  "serving_cell_distance" REAL /* Distance to the serving cell */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the device making the measurement */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Frequency band of the network */,
  "cell_tower_type" TEXT /* Type of cell tower */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement */,
  "network_latency" INTEGER /* Network latency in milliseconds */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss percentage */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_operator_name FOREIGN KEY ("operator_name") REFERENCES operators ("operator_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_network_mode FOREIGN KEY ("network_mode") REFERENCES network_modes ("network_mode"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operator */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the operator operates */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_towers" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell tower */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell tower */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the cell tower */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the cell tower */,
  "tower_height" INTEGER /* Height of the cell tower in meters */,
  "antenna_type" TEXT /* Type of antenna used */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation of the cell tower */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of maintenance in months */,
  "tower_status" TEXT /* Status of the cell tower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_modes" (
  "network_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network mode */,
  "network_mode" TEXT /* Name of the network mode (e.g., LTE, 5G) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network mode */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard associated with the network mode */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum theoretical speed of the network mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_network_modes" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "network_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "network_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_operators" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_cell_towers" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, data analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_measurements" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_locations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "serving_cells" (
  "serving_cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each serving cell */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell tower */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the serving cell */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the serving cell */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the serving cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("serving_cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_serving_cells_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES cell_towers ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_serving_cells" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "serving_cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the serving cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "serving_cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., RSRP, RSRQ) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage data point */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES measurements_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
column_names: State of the device (e.g., D, I)
Identifier for the device making the measurement

Unique identifier for each cell tower

Timestamp of when the user account was created
Timestamp of the last update to the user account
ID of the user who generated the report
Timestamp of when the report was generated
Path to the report file (if stored as a file)
Unique identifier for each serving cell
Unique identifier for each performance metric
Name of the metric (e.g., RSRP, RSRQ)
Unique identifier for each coverage data point
